LanguageData.Adultxeva_00.title: Super Hero
LanguageData.Adultxeva_00.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] became a legend in [PAWN_possessive] faction’s military, renowned for [PAWN_possessive] unmatched marksmanship. Refusing to take lives due to [PAWN_possessive] empathy, [PAWN_pronoun] perfected a technique to disable enemies by targeting their knees, earning [PAWN_objective] the title of a merciful yet terrifying warrior. [PAWN_pronoun] joined a reformist group within the faction, seeking to change its brutal reputation through diplomacy and charity. Haunted by the loss of [PAWN_possessive] family, [PAWN_nameDef] pursued leads to uncover their fate, often at great personal risk, balancing [PAWN_possessive] duty to the faction with a quest for answers.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_00.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became a legend in [PAWN_possessive] faction’s military, renowned for [PAWN_possessive] unmatched marksmanship. Refusing to take lives due to [PAWN_possessive] empathy, [PAWN_pronoun] perfected a technique to disable enemies by targeting their knees, earning [PAWN_objective] the title of a merciful yet terrifying warrior. [PAWN_pronoun] joined a reformist group within the faction, seeking to change its brutal reputation through diplomacy and charity. Haunted by the loss of [PAWN_possessive] family, [PAWN_nameDef] pursued leads to uncover their fate, often at great personal risk, balancing [PAWN_possessive] duty to the faction with a quest for answers.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_01.title: Righteous Detective
LanguageData.Adultxeva_01.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is an excellent police detective, by chance [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the government was selling orphans as experiments, [PAWN_pronoun] made the incident public and attracted the attention of those involved. During an operation to protect the MP, the involved requested a assassins to take care of [PAWN_nameDef] and the MP together. Although [PAWN_nameDef] escaped from the incident, the council accused [PAWN_objective] of spying and sentenced [PAWN_objective] to exile.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an excellent police detective, by chance [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the government was selling orphans as experiments, [PAWN_pronoun] made the incident public and attracted the attention of those involved. During an operation to protect the MP, the involved requested a assassins to take care of [PAWN_nameDef] and the MP together. Although [PAWN_nameDef] escaped from the incident, the council accused [PAWN_objective] of spying and sentenced [PAWN_objective] to exile.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_02.title: Unruly Assassin
LanguageData.Adultxeva_02.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was an experimental sample, and when the assassin group raided the lab, they brought [PAWN_objective] back for training. Soon after, [PAWN_nameDef] became a famous assassin, but [PAWN_objective] unruly behavior destroyed the organization's tradition and credo, and [PAWN_objective] supporters grew, causing the organization to split. The elders launched a purge to stop the disintegration of the organization, and eventually all of [PAWN_nameDef]'s supporters were wiped out, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to escape with the help of a mysterious man in black.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was an experimental sample, and when the assassin group raided the lab, they brought [PAWN_objective] back for training. Soon after, [PAWN_nameDef] became a famous assassin, but [PAWN_objective] unruly behavior destroyed the organization's tradition and credo, and [PAWN_objective] supporters grew, causing the organization to split. The elders launched a purge to stop the disintegration of the organization, and eventually all of [PAWN_nameDef]'s supporters were wiped out, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to escape with the help of a mysterious man in black.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_03.title: Heroic Medic
LanguageData.Adultxeva_03.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] focused on weapon design, and [PAWN_possessive] innovative creations sold extremely well, earning a substantial return on investment. Upon returning to the town, [PAWN_pronoun] discovered that [PAWN_possessive] family had been brutally murdered. Grief and anger drove [PAWN_pronoun] to kill [PAWN_possessive] first love. This course of action led [PAWN_pronoun] to deep regret. After a period of hellish self-repair, [PAWN_nameDef] transformed into a cybersurgeon dedicated to helping others.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] focused on weapon design, and [PAWN_possessive] innovative creations sold extremely well, earning a substantial return on investment. Upon returning to the town, [PAWN_pronoun] discovered that [PAWN_possessive] family had been brutally murdered. Grief and anger drove [PAWN_pronoun] to kill [PAWN_possessive] first love. This course of action led [PAWN_pronoun] to deep regret. After a period of hellish self-repair, [PAWN_nameDef] transformed into a cybersurgeon dedicated to helping others.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_04.title: Retiring Liberator
LanguageData.Adultxeva_04.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] exposed the dark side of the nation through [PAWN_possessive] work, subsequently organizing a resistance movement. [PAWN_pronoun] was branded a traitor, but the conflict was ultimately quelled by a third-party force, and [PAWN_pronoun]’s followers achieved their goals. Once the dust settled, [PAWN_nameDef] resolutely abandoned all power and honors and vanished from the public eye.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] exposed the dark side of the nation through [PAWN_possessive] work, subsequently organizing a resistance movement. [PAWN_pronoun] was branded a traitor, but the conflict was ultimately quelled by a third-party force, and [PAWN_pronoun]’s followers achieved their goals. Once the dust settled, [PAWN_nameDef] resolutely abandoned all power and honors and vanished from the public eye.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_SE.title: Combatant of Project TwinStar
LanguageData.Adultxeva_SE.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef]'s genes gave [PAWN_pronoun] combat abilities beyond those of a normal human. After [PAWN_nameDef] completed his training, [PAWN_pronoun] became a member of the TwinStar Tactical Squad, assisting the Star Explorer in dealing with the growing threat of mechs and rival factions.
LanguageData.Adultxeva_SE.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s genes gave [PAWN_pronoun] combat abilities beyond those of a normal human. After [PAWN_nameDef] completed his training, [PAWN_pronoun] became a member of the TwinStar Tactical Squad, assisting the Star Explorer in dealing with the growing threat of mechs and rival factions.
